title: 2D Diagnostic: Cross-Table Predictability (R²) and Cardinality for All FK Links
summary: Interactive demo notebook that computes cross-table predictability (R², Ridge 5-fold CV) and mutual information for foreign-key links across relational datasets (rel-hm, rel-stack, rel-amazon). Loads aligned parent/child feature matrices for 8 FK links, runs Ridge and Random Forest regression, generates 2D diagnostic scatter plots (cardinality vs R², Ridge vs RF), and classifies FK links into 4 regimes. Mini data file contains synthetic aligned feature arrays for all 8 FK links with parent/child matrices and cardinality statistics.
